message:
fix(sync): prevent semaphore spurious wake, add pool acquire timeout, recover from poisoned condvar

Semaphore: only cascade-wake next waiter when permits are actually
available, preventing spurious wake storms on AcquireFuture drop/cancel.
Previously, dropping a cancelled acquire would unconditionally wake the
next waiter even with zero permits, causing thundering herd behavior.

Pool: enforce acquire_timeout during wait-for-notification phase using
crate::time::timeout, preventing indefinite waits when resources are
never returned. Add missing drop(state) calls before waker.wake() to
avoid holding the lock during external wakeup. Remove unused eviction
tracking variables. Restructure WaiterCleanup drop handler for clarity.

OnceCell: recover from poisoned condvar in wait_for_init_blocking via
into_inner() instead of propagating the poison panic, allowing
subsequent callers to retry initialization.

ContendedMutex: eliminate redundant lock acquisition in the uncontended
fast path by unifying try_lock and lock into a single match expression.
Previously, a successful try_lock was followed by a redundant lock().

Barrier/RwLock/Mutex: formatting improvements — destructure patterns
over multiple lines, add module-level allow(unsafe_code), trailing
whitespace cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
